data.name: buttonOK.ToolTip
data.value: Generate the movie (rotation and/or translation) with the chosen settings and save it as an MP4 file.

data.name: buttonCancel.ToolTip
data.value: Close this dialog without creating a movie.

data.name: numericBoxSpeed.ToolTip
data.value: Rotation speed of the view in degrees per second (°/s, -360 to 360). Negative values reverse the rotation direction.

data.name: buttonAntiClock.ToolTip
data.value: Rotate the view counter-clockwise about the viewing axis (screen normal) for the movie.

data.name: buttonClock.ToolTip
data.value: Rotate the view clockwise about the viewing axis (screen normal) for the movie.

data.name: buttonTopLeft.ToolTip
data.value: Tilt the view toward the upper-left about the corresponding in-plane axis for the movie.

data.name: buttonLeft.ToolTip
data.value: Tilt the view to the left about the vertical screen axis for the movie.

data.name: buttonBottomLeft.ToolTip
data.value: Tilt the view toward the lower-left about the corresponding in-plane axis for the movie.

data.name: buttonBottom.ToolTip
data.value: Tilt the view downward about the horizontal screen axis for the movie.

data.name: buttonBottomRight.ToolTip
data.value: Tilt the view toward the lower-right about the corresponding in-plane axis for the movie.

data.name: buttonTop.ToolTip
data.value: Tilt the view upward about the horizontal screen axis for the movie.

data.name: buttonTopRight.ToolTip
data.value: Tilt the view toward the upper-right about the corresponding in-plane axis for the movie.

data.name: buttonRight.ToolTip
data.value: Tilt the view to the right about the vertical screen axis for the movie (default).

data.name: numericBoxDuration.ToolTip
data.value: Length of the movie in seconds.

data.name: numericBoxFps.ToolTip
data.value: Frame rate of the movie in frames per second (1-120). Higher values give smoother motion but increase the number of frames and the file size.

data.name: checkBoxIncludeFinalFrame.ToolTip
data.value: Add one extra frame at t = Duration so the movie ends exactly at the final orientation/position.

data.name: numericBoxQuality.ToolTip
data.value: MP4 encoder quality (1-100). Higher values use a higher target bitrate and increase the file size.

data.name: radioButtonAxis.ToolTip
data.value: Set the rotation axis using a crystal direction index [uvw]. When Translation is enabled, [uvw] also gives the translation direction (the only available mode).

data.name: radioButtonPlane.ToolTip
data.value: Set the rotation axis to the normal of a lattice plane (hkl).

data.name: radioButtonCurrent.ToolTip
data.value: Rotate about the currently displayed projection (orientation), choosing the tilt direction with the arrow buttons.

data.name: radioButtonH264.ToolTip
data.value: Encode the movie with the H.264 (AVC) video codec.

data.name: radioButtonH265.ToolTip
data.value: Encode the movie with the H.265 (HEVC) video codec (better compression; requires a HEVC encoder).

data.name: comboBoxSpeed.ToolTip
data.value: Encode-speed preset label (ultrafast…veryslow). Note: with the current Media Foundation encoder this only appears in the progress dialog and no longer affects the actual encoding.

data.name: label1.ToolTip
data.value: Encode-speed preset label (ultrafast…veryslow). Note: with the current Media Foundation encoder this only appears in the progress dialog and no longer affects the actual encoding.

data.name: indexControl.ToolTip
data.value: Enter the indices that define the rotation axis: a direction [uvw] in Direction-index mode, or a lattice plane (hkl) (rotation about its normal) in Lattice-plane mode. When Translation is enabled, [uvw] also sets the translation direction.

data.name: checkBoxRotation.ToolTip
data.value: Rotate the view during the movie. Uncheck to make a translation-only movie (at least one of Rotation and Translation must be enabled).

data.name: checkBoxTranslation.ToolTip
data.value: Translate the projection center during the movie. The direction is given by the direction index [uvw] (the only direction mode while this is enabled).

data.name: numericBoxTranslationSpeed.ToolTip
data.value: Speed at which the projection center moves along the direction index [uvw], in lattice periods per second (periods/s) per unit index (scaled by the index values). Negative values reverse the direction.
